prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Harrop HTV1320 supercharger** (replacing the stock Eaton TVS1320) on the **Toyota 2GR-FE 3.5L V6 (engine code: 2GR-FE)** with a **custom billet crank pulley** from **Vortech Engineering**, increasing boost to 12 psi (from 8 psi stock) and requiring a **Motec M150 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, paired with **ID1000x injectors** and a **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to handle the 550+ WHP output

Install **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers** with **Lotus-specific spring rates (800 lb/in front, 1000 lb/in rear)** and **adjustable camber plates** from **SPL Parts**, combined with **polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 6945K)** for the rear subframe to eliminate flex under hard cornering, while integrating a **Tillet B12 widebody conversion** to accommodate **295/30/19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** on **Forgeline GA3R 19x11 wheels**

Replace the stock **Lotus-specific titanium exhaust manifold** with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel equal-length header** from **Burns Stainless**, paired with a **Borla Atak cat-back exhaust (2.5-inch piping, quad 4-inch tips)** and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** to optimize spool and mid-range torque, while upgrading the **Lotus AP Racing CP8450 brake calipers** with **Hawk HT-14 brake pads** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors** for fade-resistant stopping power
estetica: Install a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Lotus Evora-specific) with **carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser**, featuring **integrated LED turn signals** and **custom carbon fiber canards** from **Seibon Carbon**, while retaining the **Lotus Active Rear Wing** but modifying it with a **Gurney flap** for increased downforce

Replace the stock **Lotus Evora GT410 Sport interior** with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara inserts)** and a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede grip)**, while adding a **custom roll cage (T45 steel, Lotus-approved design)** from **Custom Cages UK**, wrapped in **diamond-stitched Alcantara** with **red contrast stitching** to match the **Lotus Motorsport Red exterior paint (code: 008)**

Upgrade the **Lotus Evora GT410 Sport lighting** with **Lux H8 V4 LED headlights (6000K, adaptive beam pattern)**, **Morimoto XB35 LED fog lights**, and a **custom rear light delete panel** featuring **RGB LED strips (Philips Hue integration)** controlled via **Lotus infotainment system (OEM+ integration)**, while adding **carbon fiber side mirrors (Seibon Carbon, heated, auto-dimming)** with **integrated blind-spot cameras (Mobileye 8 Connect)**
